section.heading: Persons subject to military commissions

content.p: Any alien unprivileged enemy belligerent is subject to trial by military commission as set forth in this chapter.

section.sourceCredit: (Added Pub. L. 111–84, div. A, title XVIII, § 1802, Oct. 28, 2009, 123 Stat. 2576.)

note.heading: Prior Provisions
note.p: A prior section 948c, added Pub. L. 109–366, § 3(a)(1), Oct. 17, 2006, 120 Stat. 2602, related to persons subject to military commissions, prior to the general amendment of this chapter by Pub. L. 111–84.
